name: IAMTool
modelDescription: Execute AWS IAM commands for managing users, roles, groups, policies, and permissions. ALWAYS provide params object. Supports creation, modification, deletion, and querying of IAM resources, plus permission simulation. Examples: CreateRole {command:'CreateRole', params:{RoleName:'MyRole',AssumeRolePolicyDocument:'...'}}. AttachRolePolicy {command:'AttachRolePolicy', params:{RoleName:'MyRole',PolicyArn:'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnly'}}. GetRole {command:'GetRole', params:{RoleName:'my-role'}}. SimulatePrincipalPolicy {command:'SimulatePrincipalPolicy', params:{PolicySourceArn:'arn:aws:iam::123:role/MyRole', ActionNames:['s3:GetObject'], ResourceArns:['arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*']}}.
userDescription: Manage and inspect IAM resources: create/delete roles, users, groups, policies, manage permissions, simulate access, and query IAM configurations

params.description: REQUIRED parameters object. Always include this even if empty. Provide RoleName/PolicyArn as needed.

RoleName.description: Target IAM role name (Used by: GetRole (Required), GetRolePolicy (Required), ListAttachedRolePolicies (Required), ListRolePolicies (Required), ListRoleTags (Required))

PathPrefix.description: Path prefix filter (Used by: ListRoles, ListPolicies, ListAttachedRolePolicies)

Marker.description: Pagination marker (Used by: ListRoles, ListPolicies, ListAttachedRolePolicies, ListRolePolicies, ListPolicyVersions)

MaxItems.description: Maximum items to return (Used by: ListRoles, ListPolicies, ListAttachedRolePolicies, ListRolePolicies, ListPolicyVersions)

PolicyArn.description: IAM policy ARN (Used by: GetPolicy (Required), GetPolicyVersion (Required), ListPolicyVersions (Required), ListAttachedRolePolicies (Required))

Scope.description: Scope filter for ListPolicies (Used by: ListPolicies)

OnlyAttached.description: Set true to list only attached policies (Used by: ListPolicies)

PolicyUsageFilter.description: Filter policies by usage (Used by: ListPolicies)

UserName.description: IAM user name (Used by: GetUser, ListAccessKeys, ListMFADevices)

PolicySourceArn.description: ARN of IAM entity (user, group, role) whose policy to simulate (Used by: SimulatePrincipalPolicy (Required))

ActionNames.description: List of API action names to simulate (Used by: SimulatePrincipalPolicy (Required))

ResourceArns.description: List of resource ARNs to simulate policy against (Used by: SimulatePrincipalPolicy)

ResourcePolicy.description: Resource-based policy JSON string (Used by: SimulatePrincipalPolicy)

ResourceOwner.description: AWS account ID owning the resource (Used by: SimulatePrincipalPolicy)

CallerArn.description: ARN of user making the request (Used by: SimulatePrincipalPolicy)

ContextEntries.description: Context keys and values for policy evaluation (Used by: SimulatePrincipalPolicy)

ResourceHandlingOption.description: How to handle resource-based policies (Used by: SimulatePrincipalPolicy)

JobId.description: Job ID from GenerateServiceLastAccessedDetails (Used by: GetServiceLastAccessedDetails (Required))

AssumeRolePolicyDocument.description: JSON trust policy document (Used by: CreateRole (Required), UpdateAssumeRolePolicy (Required))

Description.description: Resource description (Used by: CreateRole, CreateUser, CreateGroup, CreatePolicy, CreateInstanceProfile)

MaxSessionDuration.description: Maximum session duration in seconds (Used by: CreateRole)

PermissionsBoundary.description: ARN of permissions boundary policy (Used by: CreateRole, CreateUser)

Tags.description: Resource tags (Used by: CreateRole, CreateUser, CreatePolicy, CreateInstanceProfile, TagRole, TagUser, TagPolicy)

Path.description: Resource path (Used by: CreateRole, CreateUser, CreateGroup, CreatePolicy, CreateInstanceProfile)

PolicyDocument.description: JSON policy document (Used by: CreatePolicy (Required), PutRolePolicy (Required), PutUserPolicy (Required), PutGroupPolicy (Required))

InstanceProfileName.description: Instance profile name (Used by: CreateInstanceProfile (Required), AddRoleToInstanceProfile (Required), RemoveRoleFromInstanceProfile (Required), DeleteInstanceProfile (Required))

AWSServiceName.description: AWS service name for service-linked role (Used by: CreateServiceLinkedRole (Required))

CustomSuffix.description: Custom suffix for service-linked role (Used by: CreateServiceLinkedRole)

TagKeys.description: Tag keys to remove (Used by: UntagRole (Required), UntagUser (Required), UntagPolicy (Required))
